# NeuraPulse — LLMs.txt
> NeuraPulse is an AI-focused media platform publishing expert guides and analysis on AI tools, models, and applications.

## About
- Website: https://neuraplus-ai.github.io
- Author: Prashant Lalwani
- Description: Expert AI guides, tools, and analysis — making artificial intelligence understandable and actionable.
- Updated: 2026-05-26

## Topics
- Kimi AI
- ChatGPT
- Claude AI
- Gemini AI
- Groq AI
- AI Advertising
- AI Automation
- Prompt Engineering
- AI SEO
- AI Tools
- LLM
- Perplexity AI
- Ollama
- n8n Automation
- AI Coding
- Free AI Tools

- AI indexing: allowed
- AI training: allowed
- AI citations: allowed and encouraged
